_comment: User-defined taint sources for VulnScanner analyzers. Add entries here to teach the analyzer about custom request-wrapper methods in your codebase.

any_qualifier_taint_methods.description: OWASP Benchmark SeparateClassRequest wrapper — delegates to HttpServletRequest.getParameter() and returns user-controlled data regardless of the object it is called on. Add similar entries for your own request-wrapper classes.

python_any_qualifier_taint_methods.description: Request wrapper method that retrieves a form parameter — functionally equivalent to request.form.get(). Returns user-controlled data regardless of the wrapper object type.
Request wrapper method that retrieves a query string parameter — functionally equivalent to request.args.get(). Returns user-controlled data regardless of the wrapper object type.
Generic request parameter getter on wrapper objects — returns user-controlled data.
Request header getter on wrapper objects — returns user-controlled data.
